/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-internet-apps-default.dylib -install_name @rpath/libns3.37-internet-apps-default.dylib "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/helper/dhcp-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/helper/ping6-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/helper/radvd-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/helper/v4ping-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/helper/v4traceroute-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/model/dhcp-client.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/model/dhcp-header.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/model/dhcp-server.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/model/ping6.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/model/radvd-interface.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/model/radvd-prefix.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/model/radvd.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/model/v4ping.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libinternet-apps-obj.dir/model/v4traceroute.cc.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/python@3.13/Frameworks -Wl,-rpath,/Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-internet-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-bridge-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-traffic-control-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-network-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-stats-default.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-core-default.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gsl/2.8/lib/libgsl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gsl/2.8/lib/libgslcblas.dylib
